scripts.dev:backend: npm run build --workspace @porter/shared && npm run start:dev --workspace @porter/backend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --workspace @porter/shared && npm run build --workspace @porter/backend
scripts.start:backend:migrate: npm run migrate:backend && npm run start:backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @porter/shared && npm run build --workspace @porter/backend && npm run build --workspace @porter/admin && npm run build --workspace @porter/mobile && npm run build --workspace @porter/driver
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @porter/shared && npm run lint --workspace @porter/backend && npm run lint --workspace @porter/admin && npm run lint --workspace @porter/mobile && npm run lint --workspace @porter/driver
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @porter/shared && npm run test --workspace @porter/backend && npm run test --workspace @porter/admin && npm run test --workspace @porter/mobile && npm run test --workspace @porter/driver
